descFull: The local-first LLM Wiki: open-source knowledge graph builder, RAG knowledge base, and agent memory store. Built on Andrej Karpathy's pattern. An Obsidian alternative for personal knowledge management, AI second brain, and durable Claude Code / Codex / OpenClaw memory.
